LanguageData.IWantThis.EnableCap: Enable a prize cap for bounties (default {0})
LanguageData.IWantThis.Cap: Bounties will not exceed specified amount
LanguageData.IWantThis.IntervalArrival: Range of days before bounty hunter arrives (default {0} - {1} days)
LanguageData.IWantThis.InfoBounty: The bounty will cost ${0}, you currently have ${1} worth of {2}
